fields.title: Canonicalize main-session /mode and runtime hooks on ExecutionRuntime
fields.description: Once the execution state foundation exists, move main-session mode/model/thinking behavior onto a single runtime adapter so tau, not Pi getters or hidden locals, controls the desired execution state.
fields.design: Add services/execution-runtime.ts as the only place that mutates Pi model/thinking/tool runtime for tau-managed execution. Move /mode command wiring plus session_start, session_switch, model_select, and before_agent_start integration into that service. Remove promptModes-specific activeMode stripping from services/persistence.ts. Drive footer and related mode UI from canonical execution state. Keep /mode as the user-facing command; internally treat default as baseline semantics rather than a no-op.
